task: CEO Directive: v4.8 strategic plan, org restructure, v4.9 parallel team, v5 vision. Dashboard must be data-driven, hire aggressively, spend the budget on speed.
response: Full CTO Memo — v4.8 Strategic Plan & Organizational Restructure. Delivered: 6-team org redesign (129 agents, 16 new hires), full v4.8 sprint plan (30 items across 3 phases, $1,200 budget), v4.9 parallel team charter (8 items), v5 vision statement, and 10 immediate actions. Dashboard to be fully data-driven; all 17 sections wired to real API endpoints.
